'''[[Tiatkin]]'s starship''' was a small craft used in [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] operation against the [[Eiattu pirates|TIE Pirates]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}}
